## 📋 Pull Request Checklist

Thank you for contributing to the ELIM Church Website! Please ensure your PR meets these requirements:

### ✅ Pre-submission Checklist
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guidelines](.github/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes

### 🎯 Type of Change
Please select the type of change this PR introduces:

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/formatting changes
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvements
- [ ] 🧪 Tests

### 📖 Description
<!-- Provide a clear and concise description of what this PR does -->

**Summary:**
<!-- Brief summary of changes -->

**Motivation and Context:**
<!-- Why is this change required? What problem does it solve? -->
<!-- If it fixes an open issue, please link to the issue here: Fixes #123 -->

### 🧪 Testing
<!-- Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes -->
<!-- Include details of your testing environment, tests ran, etc. -->

**Test Configuration:**
- [ ] Local development environment
- [ ] Backend tests: `python manage.py test`
- [ ] Frontend tests: `npm test`
- [ ] Linting: `npm run lint`

**Manual Testing:**
- [ ] Tested on desktop browser
- [ ] Tested on mobile browser
- [ ] Tested with different user roles (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested edge cases

### 📱 Screenshots (if applicable)

**Before:**
<!-- Screenshot of before state -->

**After:**
<!-- Screenshot of after state -->

### 🔄 Database Changes
<!-- If your changes affect the database -->
- [ ] No database changes
- [ ] Database migration included
- [ ] Migration tested locally
- [ ] Backward compatibility maintained

### 🌐 API Changes
<!-- If your changes affect the API -->
- [ ] No API changes
- [ ] New endpoints added
- [ ] Existing endpoints modified
- [ ] API documentation updated
- [ ] Backward compatibility maintained

### 📚 Documentation
<!-- What documentation changes are needed? -->
- [ ] No documentation needed
- [ ] README updated
- [ ] API documentation updated
- [ ] Comments added to code
- [ ] Deployment guide updated

### 🔐 Security Considerations
<!-- Are there any security implications? -->
- [ ] No security implications
- [ ] Authentication/authorization changes
- [ ] Input validation added
- [ ] Sensitive data handling reviewed
- [ ] CORS settings updated

### 🚀 Deployment Notes
<!-- Any special deployment considerations? -->
- [ ] No special deployment needed
- [ ] Environment variables need updating
- [ ] New dependencies added
- [ ] Static files need collecting
- [ ] Database migration required
